title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Medlife Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Medlife Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Medlife Advisory Limited family as a Backend Developer in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Medlife Advisory Limited:
Medlife Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medlife Advisory Limited!
